de'aaron fox.detail: Played 37 minutes in NBA Finals Game 5; sources confirm he has been nursing an ankle injury throughout the postseason but played full minutes without reported exit
de'aaron fox.web_narrative: Fox scored only 7 points on what sources describe as a lingering ankle injury he has been managing throughout the postseason. The ankle issue likely hampered his offensive production, contributing to the miss on the PTS over 10 prop.

devin vassell.detail: Played 39 minutes in NBA Finals Game 5; no injury flags or external sources available

dylan harper.detail: Played 31 minutes and scored 25 points in a season-ending Game 5 loss; normal game completion

jalen brunson.detail: Played 41 minutes and was named NBA Finals MVP with 45 points; completed game normally despite a knee injury suffered in Game 1
jalen brunson.web_narrative: Brunson recorded only 3 assists despite a dominant 45-point performance, as his scoring usage in the closeout game left limited opportunities to distribute. The knee injury sustained in Game 1 did not prevent him from completing Game 5.

mikal bridges.detail: Played 39 minutes in NBA Finals Game 5; no injury flags or external sources available

og anunoby.detail: Played 33 minutes in NBA Finals Game 5; no mid-game exit reported
og anunoby.web_narrative: Anunoby hit only 1 of his three-point attempts in Game 5 after a historic 7-for-9 performance from three in Game 4, a classic regression game where his shooting simply did not fall.

stephon castle.detail: Played 32 minutes in NBA Finals Game 5; had previously injured his ankle in Game 2 but played through it
stephon castle.web_narrative: Castle shot 1-for-10 from the field for only 6 points, a cold-shooting performance described by Rotowire as 'going missing.' The ankle injury he suffered in Game 2 likely continued to affect his effectiveness offensively.

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 38 minutes in NBA Finals Game 5 with a double-double; completed game normally
victor wembanyama.web_narrative: Wembanyama went 1-for-6 from three-point range in Game 5, missing the 3PM over 2 prop due to poor shooting efficiency from deep rather than any injury or game situation.
